fidelity_policy: Declare adapter fidelity from primitive contracts; do not infer enforcement from advisory files.
limitations: Current COS projection proof writes and verifies structural opencode.json only; no account-backed OpenCode runtime invocation is in automated tests yet.

OpenCode's official plugin API exposes tool.execute.before/tool.execute.after and permission surfaces that can enforce some COS primitives. Do not model OpenCode as documented-only or structural-advisory once a COS OpenCode plugin adapter is implemented and smoke-tested.
No COS OpenCode plugin adapter has been signed yet, so ACC must not claim runtime enforcement from the existing opencode.json structural projection.
